article_title: Supplementary Material to: Thermal conductivity of chemical vapor deposition diamond enriched with 13C isotope
criterion: Peak thermal conductivity at or above 3300 W/m/K in public isotopic-diamond data.
note: The current Figshare source is a PDF supplement. The script now attempts machine tables first and then a conservative PDF text scan. It does not digitize plotted curves; if only figures are present, MAT6 remains not executable from this source without a numeric table or digitization.
